description: A curated collection of foundational treaties, protocols, and regulations of the East African Community.

documents.title: Treaty for the Establishment of the East African Community
documents.summary: The foundational treaty establishing the East African Community, laying the groundwork for regional integration, cooperation, and a common market among member states.

documents.title: Protocol on the Establishment of the East African Community Common Market
documents.summary: Establishes the EAC Common Market, guaranteeing the free movement of goods, services, capital, and labor across all member states.

documents.title: Protocol on the East African Community Court of Justice
documents.summary: Establishes the East African Community Court of Justice, its jurisdiction, composition, and procedures for resolving disputes related to the interpretation and application of the Treaty.
documents.citation_format: EAC Protocol on the Court of Justice (2015)

documents.title: Regulation on the Harmonization of Standards and Quality Infrastructure
documents.summary: Harmonizes standards and quality assurance measures across the EAC to facilitate trade and ensure the safety of products within the community.

documents.title: Regulation on the Harmonization of Investment Policies
documents.summary: Harmonizes investment policies across the EAC to create a unified and attractive investment environment for domestic and foreign investors.

documents.title: Regulation on the Harmonization of Customs Procedures
documents.summary: Harmonizes customs procedures and documentation across EAC member states to facilitate cross-border trade and reduce non-tariff barriers.

documents.title: Protocol on the EAC Political Confederation
documents.summary: Outlines the framework for the eventual establishment of a political confederation of EAC member states, deepening regional integration beyond economic cooperation.

documents.title: Regulation on the Harmonization of Business Registration
documents.summary: Directs member states to harmonize business registration procedures to reduce the time and cost of starting a business within the community.
documents.citation_format: EAC Regulation on Business Registration Harmonization (2019)

documents.title: Regulation on the East African Passport
documents.summary: Establishes the legal framework for the issuance and mutual recognition of the East African e-passport across all member states.
documents.citation_format: EAC Regulation on the East African Passport (2016)

documents.title: EAC Court of Justice: Tanzania v. Kenya (2021)
documents.summary: A landmark judgment by the EAC Court of Justice affirming the supremacy of community law over national law in matters related to the Common Market Protocol.
